accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all details traceable to bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as increasing veterans' disability compensation and DIC rates effective December 1, 2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes COLA-linked increase to specific Title 38 benefit amounts.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the special rule for persons under Public Law 85-857 who have not received compensation under chapter 11.

effective_dates.why: Notes effective date of December 1, 2024, and publication deadline tied to FY2025 Social Security COLA.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including benefit categories, COLA linkage, special rule, and Federal Register publication requirement.

correct_entities.why: VA, Title 38 sections, Social Security Act sections all correctly cited.

correct_figures.why: December 1, 2024 effective date and November 30, 2024 reference date correctly stated.
